title: Assertion fault:  Text encoding mismatch on value comparison
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE comments (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT, comment TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, comment) VALUES (1, 'This is a comment');
SELECT * FROM users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER('TESTuser');
key_bug_features: Text encoding mismatch on value comparison
